====Paldea Pokémon Trainers====
Nemona and her Pawmo appear alongside other Trainers from Paldea on merchandise from the Paldea Pokémon Trainers line, released on July 11th, 2025 through the online [[Pokémon Center (store)#Online|Pokémon Center]] in the West.
